definition:
WITH pending_processes AS (
         SELECT processes.id,
            processes."position",
            processes.priority_position,
            processes.number,
            processes.entry_date,
            processes.court,
            processes.nucleus,
            processes.priority,
            processes.status,
            processes.assigned_to_id,
            processes.assignment_date,
            processes.completion_date,
            processes.valor_custas,
            processes.observacao,
            processes.created_at,
                CASE
                    WHEN (processes.priority ~~* '%SUPER%'::text) THEN 1
                    ELSE 2
                END AS priority_level,
                CASE
                    WHEN ((processes.priority ~~* '%SUPER%'::text) OR (processes.priority ~~* '%LEGAL%'::text) OR (processes.priority ~~ '1-%'::text) OR (processes.priority ~~ '2-PRIORIDADE%'::text)) THEN true
                    ELSE false
                END AS is_priority
           FROM processes
          WHERE (processes.status ~~* 'Pendente'::text)
        ), ranked_processes AS (
         SELECT pending_processes.id,
            pending_processes.priority_level,
            row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY pending_processes.nucleus ORDER BY pending_processes.entry_date, pending_processes.id) AS calculated_position,
                CASE
                    WHEN pending_processes.is_priority THEN row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY pending_processes.nucleus, pending_processes.is_priority ORDER BY pending_processes.priority_level, pending_processes.entry_date, pending_processes.id)
                    ELSE NULL::bigint
                END AS calculated_priority_position
           FROM pending_processes
        )
 SELECT p.id,
    p.number,
    p.entry_date,
    p.court,
    p.nucleus,
    p.priority,
    p.status,
    p.assigned_to_id,
    p.assignment_date,
    p.completion_date,
    p.valor_custas,
    p.observacao,
    p.created_at,
    COALESCE(rp.calculated_position, (p."position")::bigint) AS "position",
    COALESCE(rp.calculated_priority_position, (p.priority_position)::bigint) AS priority_position,
    rp.priority_level
   FROM (processes p
     LEFT JOIN ranked_processes rp ON ((p.id = rp.id)));
